---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for BreachIntel
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

### Problem Description

What problem are you trying to solve?  
Describe the user need, pain point, or limitation in the current behavior.

### Proposed Solution

What do you want BreachIntel to do?  
Be as specific as possible about the desired behavior, including UI changes, APIs, or data model impacts.

### Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?  
List them and explain why they are insufficient.

### Additional Context

Add any other context, diagrams, mockups, or pseudo-code that might help clarify the request.
